name: Legendary Hunter
description: Legendary Anshin class mod for Axton the Commando, part of the Digistruct Peak content. Built around Headsh0t, Fast Hands, C0unter Strike, Killing Bl0w, Ir0n Hand. Focused on sniper and pistol performance with shield bonuses.
notes: Requires the Digistruct Peak Challenge DLC. Drops from Tubby enemies in Ultimate Vault Hunter Mode at level 62+.

special.description: At max level: +58% shield capacity, +57.5% shield recharge rate. While the turret is active, grants +52% team ammo regen rate.
special.title: I never die.

abilities: Using Deception instantly restores 10% of your Max Health.
